Case Studies

Challenge, process, iteration, and outcomes in full detail

A process-first archive of strategic thinking, visual development, production execution, and measurable business results.

Case Studies

Story-led delivery from challenge to measurable impact

A transparent view of our process, iterations, and the final outcomes shipped for clients and internal titles.

Titanfall Academy Rebrand

Challenge

An aging game academy needed a premium identity to attract global students.

Process

We built a new strategic narrative, visual language, and cinematic campaign toolkit.

Final Output

The brand relaunch became the center of a full digital enrollment refresh.

+73% inquiry conversion+41% social engagement2.6x brand recall

Skyforge Launcher UX

Challenge

Users dropped during patch and purchase flows inside the game launcher.

Process

We redesigned IA, introduced motion wayfinding, and rebuilt the UI with reusable states.

Final Output

The launcher became faster, clearer, and more cinematic without sacrificing performance.

-38% drop-off+29% session time+18% DLC purchases
